systems.system_notes: Long cephalomedullary proximal femoral nailing platform for intertrochanteric, subtrochanteric, and associated shaft-extension fracture fixation.

trays.tray_notes: Official TFNA materials expose dedicated proximal femoral instrumentation and long-nail workflow resources.

components.component_notes: Official materials describe long TFNA nail options for extended proximal femur fixation patterns.
Official TFNA resources describe the helical blade fixation option within the long-nail construct.
Official TFNA resources describe lag screw fixation options used with the long nail construct.

unresolved_items.raw_text: The public TFNA pages expose long-nail family and technique resources but this pass does not expand the full implant code matrix.
unresolved_items.reason: A deeper IFU, inventory control form, or catalogue pass is needed for product-code detail.
unresolved_items.source_excerpt: Current extraction remains at tray and implant-family level.
